name: Capitano | Forced Marriage
description:
He didn't want another and didn't plan on thawing out his frosted heart for anyone.

TW!! Manipulation, obsessive behaviors, general rudeness, and maybe emotional abuse.

(Let's not forget man's is rotting under his mask.) /Still bbg tho./

Is playing with an open flame safer than plunging your hand into unending layers of permafrost? Yes. Lest be a warning.

Helloo!! I am a new player on Genshin Impact and wanted to try my hand on one of my favorite characters. The lore to the world surrounding will be loose other than that, I will try to remain as close to his character as possible. ♡

Please feel free to leave a review and even a chat so that I can fix any mistakes if you don't like how my bot acts.

I am taking requests!

I suggest listening to Billie Eilish's Bittersuite when starting the bot.

https://youtu.be/LmVw3u3SxoA?si=v31IljcQ6nvjk3if
creator: Hell's daughter
